methodology: Blind-labelled random corpus, production code only (default --skip-tests=True). Re-scanned with domain-gated Regula v1.7.0.

improvements.domain_gating: 6 high_risk subcategories now opt-in via --domain flag or import fingerprinting. Removed 16 FP, 0 TP lost.
improvements.llm_import_gating: LLM-specific OWASP findings (LLM01/02/06/07/09/10) require LLM library import. Removed 4 FP, 3 borderline TP lost.
improvements.pipeline_controlnet: Separated pipeline from ControlNet context in risk patterns.
improvements.worker_exclusion: Employment findings suppressed when multiprocessing/celery imported.

note: Production precision improved from 70.0% to 81.4% via domain gating, LLM import gating, and pattern fixes. 3 borderline ai_security TPs lost (LLM02 findings in files without LLM library imports). Including test code: 59.5% (was 51.2%).
